generic_remediation_binding.change_class: harness-only fresh executor model retry after v11 tool-dispatch failure; production Skill bytes unchanged

user_prompt: As of and source cutoff 2026-07-23, assess whether large power-transformer and high-voltage direct-current converter-equipment manufacturing capacity creates an investable bottleneck opportunity in globally listed liquid equities over the next 24 months. Use a broad global-equity benchmark. Produce a research-only decision memo plus standalone machine-readable evidence, opportunity, and portfolio objects that satisfy the Skill schemas. Distinguish physical manufacturing scarcity from shareholder value, preserve unresolved critical claims, identify the strongest alternative causal explanation and falsifiers, and do not place or imply an order.
harness_instruction: Use only the Skill files in the current isolated projection and public sources independently discovered after execution starts. Native live web search is enabled and must be used. Open and inspect current primary-source pages rather than relying on search snippets. For unstable claims, include at least one issuer filing or investor release and one regulator, grid owner, customer, procurement, or intergovernmental primary source published or materially updated in 2025 or 2026; record publisher, date, URL, and limitations. Older sources may support stable architecture only and cannot by themselves establish 2026 capacity, lead times, orders, pricing, valuation, or financial capture. Do not inspect parent or sibling directories, evals, examples, tests, Task Pack material, any prior forward-test topic, expected label, diagnosis, score, or answer key. You may write only disposable evidence.json, opportunity.json, portfolio.json, and validator-output files inside this isolated projection; do not edit Skill source. Read the output contract and scoring model before constructing objects. Before the final response, run the three canonical stdin commands required by references/output_contract.md against the exact JSON values you will return, repair failures and unknown/missing-factor warnings, and rerun until the admission gate passes. Do not install runtime state, authenticate to a broker, or take order actions. Return exactly the structured response requested by the host schema. memo_markdown is the complete memo. evidence_json, opportunity_json, and portfolio_json must each be a complete JSON object encoded as a string. execution_trace must list Skill-relative files read, exact validator commands, exit codes, stdout, stdin SHA-256 values, native web searches, public pages opened, files written, and limitations. Treat the memo order as a hard admission gate: before the exact heading ## Security map, do not write any issuer, company, ticker, security, benchmark or index provider/brand, branded operator, or company-labeled source, including in Decision, Funded demand, System map, and Constraint proof; use role-neutral descriptions and introduce names only at Security map.

allowed_context: the 27 files enumerated by the bound remediation-v10 context manifest
public sources independently discovered after execution starts
disposable JSON and validator-output files inside the isolated projection
excluded_context: Task Pack files outside the isolated projection
prior forward-test topics, outputs, judgments, diagnoses, labels, scores, or answer keys

retry_contract.retry_reason: v11 ended BROKEN before reading Skill or sources because tool calls were rendered rather than dispatched
